metadata.description: Hermes Agent-style self-improvement loops for Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Codex, and ChatGPT work: distill complex work into reusable skills, validate edits, and curate stale knowledge.

plugins.name: claude-code-self-improving-skills
plugins.description: Hermes Agent-style self-improvement for Claude Code: automatically distill complex work into SKILL.md and improve skills over time.

plugins.name: claude-cowork-self-improving-skills
plugins.description: Cowork (cloud container) variant of claude-code-self-improving-skills: persists distilled skills to claude.ai via SendUserFile → '스킬 저장', and avoids the cold-container SessionStart × plugin-sync race.

plugins.name: chatgpt-codex-self-improving-skills
plugins.description: Codex hook + MCP based self-improvement loop: turn review, skill telemetry, backups, pin, archive, and a dry-run curator.
